CREATE TABLE user_profiles (user_id UInt32, profile_name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY user_id;
SELECT profile_name FROM user_profiles WHERE user_id = 1;
CREATE VIEW profile_view AS SELECT user_id, profile_name FROM user_profiles WHERE profile_name = 'default_profile';
SELECT defaultProfiles() AS profiles, user_id FROM user_profiles WHERE user_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM user_profiles WHERE profile_name = 'default_profile') ORDER BY user_id;
SELECT defaultProfiles() AS profiles FROM user_profiles JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT profile_name FROM user_profiles) AS profiles_list ON user_profiles.profile_name = profiles_list.profile_name;
